intro: Sisymbrianthus pusillus, also known as the dwarf alangium, is a small, flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Sichuan province in China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its potential to protect against cardiovascular disease, cancer, and neurodegenerative disorders.
